responses: Hello! I am your customer service assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! You can ask me about orders, returns, refunds, payments, delivery, or support.
Goodbye! Thanks for contacting customer support.
Have a great day. I am here whenever you need help.
You are welcome!
Happy to help.
To track an order, please enter your order ID on the tracking page or share it with a support agent.
Your order status can be checked using the order ID sent to your registered email or phone number.
Most products can be returned within 7 days of delivery if they are unused and in original packaging.
To start a return, open your order details and choose the return or exchange option.
Refunds are usually processed within 5 to 7 business days after the returned item is verified.
If your refund is delayed, please share your order ID with a support agent for checking.
If payment failed but money was deducted, it is usually reversed by the bank within 3 to 5 business days.
Please avoid retrying multiple times. Check your bank statement and contact support with the transaction ID if needed.
Delivery usually takes 3 to 7 business days depending on your location.
Shipping charges and delivery time are shown at checkout before payment.
You can cancel an order from the order details page before it is shipped.
If the order has already shipped, you may refuse delivery or request a return after receiving it.
I can connect you with a support agent. Please provide your name, order ID, and issue summary.
For human support, keep your order ID ready so the agent can help faster.
Customer support is available from 9 AM to 8 PM, Monday to Saturday.
You can still leave your query outside support hours and an agent will respond later.
